data.title: I Peace successfully generated human iPS cells from NKT cells. Visit https://ipeace.com/en/ for more info.
data.description: A prominent GMP cell therapy CDMO, I Peace, Inc., based in Palo Alto, California, revealed on January 30, 2026, that it has effectively produced human induced pluripotent stem (iPS) cells. The company, known for its expertise in induced pluripotent stem cells (iPSCs) and iPSC-derived cell therapies, operates through its website at ipeace.com/en/.

data.title: AS LHV Group acquired own shares on Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange during 23.-29.01.2026.
data.description: LHV Group disclosed that from 23 to 29 January 2026, the company purchased its own shares on the Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange.

data.title: AS Tallinna Vesi to host Investor Conference Webinar for Q4 2025 results. Open to shareholders, investors, analysts.
data.description: AS Tallinna Vesi is extending an invitation to its shareholders, investors, analysts, and stakeholders to participate in an investor conference webinar. The webinar will focus on the financial results for the 4th quarter and the entirety of the year 2025. This provides a comprehensive overview of the company's performance during this period and is crucial for parties interested in the company's progress. Attendees will have the opportunity to gain insights into the company's financial standing, with a particular emphasis on key figures such as revenue, profits, and any notable achievements or challenges faced throughout the year.

data.title: Janus Henderson Group (NYSE: JHG) beat estimated earnings by 69.0% in Q4, reported EPS of $2.01 vs $1.19, revenue up $433.70M.
data.description: Janus Henderson Group (NYSE: JHG) released its Q4 earnings on Friday, January 30, 2026 at 07:30 AM. In a significant beat, the company reported an EPS of $2.01, surpassing the estimated $1.19 by 69.0%. Revenue also saw a notable increase, rising by $433.70 million compared to the previous year. For more details on the earnings report and historical earnings summary, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Greenland Resources will present Malmbjerg project at BMO Conference on Feb 24, 2026 at 11.15 am EST in Florida. TSX: MOLY, FSE: M0LY.
data.description: In Toronto, Greenland Resources Inc. (TSX:MOLY | FSE: M0LY) shared updates on its Malmbjerg project in Greenland. The Company is set to showcase the Project on February 24, 2026, at 11.15 am EST at the BMO Capital Markets' 35th Global Metals, Mining & Critical Minerals Conference in Hollywood, Florida. Additionally, Greenland Resources will engage in round table discussions as part of the event.

data.title: Star Bulk to release Q4 results on Feb 25, 2026. Conference call on Feb 26, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: Star Bulk Carriers Corp. (Nasdaq: SBLK) based in Athens, Greece, is scheduled to unveil its fourth-quarter results for the period ending December 31, 2025. data.title: Investors in Gauzy between March 11, 2025 and Nov 13, 2025 urged to contact James (Josh) Wilson regarding potential losses.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Gauzy to reach out to him to explore potential options. Those who bought or received Gauzy securities between March 11, 2025, and November 13, 2025, are encouraged to discuss their situations directly.

data.title: Investors urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP regarding losses in agilon health between Feb 26, 2025 - Aug 4, 2025.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in agilon health to reach out to him directly for a consultation on their options. If you bought or obtained securities in agilon health within the period of February 26, 2025, to August 4, 2025 and incurred losses, Wilson advises contacting him promptly for assistance.
